case_title: CCSF-OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR VS. JORDON POWELL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,698.00 FILED BY CCSF-OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, JORDON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JUMA BYRD--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2015 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $908.73 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, JORDON
